plan_history.intent_description: Host 172.16.0.12 is unreachable (25 ICMP pings sent, 0 replies). Impact: host is not reachable from the network. Desired outcome: restore IP connectivity to 172.16.0.12.
plan_history.problem: 172.16.0.12 not responding to ICMP; likely R2 LAN interface misconfiguration or stale ARP on R2.
plan_history.fix_summary: Ensure R2 GigabitEthernet0/0/0 is configured with 172.16.0.1/24 and brought up; clear any ARP entry for 172.16.0.12 to force re-ARP.

plan_history.intent_description: Host 172.16.0.12 is unreachable (25 ICMP pings sent, 0 replies). Impact: host is not reachable from the network. Desired outcome: restore IP connectivity to 172.16.0.12.
plan_history.problem: Router 'router2' interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0 (gateway for 172.16.0.0/24) is administratively down, causing loss of IP connectivity to 172.16.0.12.
plan_history.fix_summary: Enable GigabitEthernet0/0/0 on router2 to restore the 172.16.0.0/24 connectivity. Operational risk: router2 may be unreachable from the management plane; the action may fail if the device control-plane is down.

remaining_issues: Cannot confirm GigabitEthernet0/0/0 on router2 is administratively up — verification call returned no data.
